initiatives.name: La Mujer Obrera
initiatives.description: A women-led organization that develops and celebrates Mexican heritage through economic development, community building, and mutual aid initiatives. They operate several social enterprises including Café Mayapán, Lummetik Trading Co., and Rayito de Sol Daycare, while maintaining programs focused on cultural preservation, food sovereignty, and community organizing through their Tierra es Vida Community Farm and various cultural programs.

initiatives.name: Borderland Rainbow Center
initiatives.description: A community space in which lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer/questioning, intersex (LGBTQI) people and their allies can heal, grow, and empower themselves and others.

initiatives.name: Border Network for Human Rights
initiatives.description: Fighting for justice, dignity & social change at our southern border
